title: The Cherry Kingdom
description: The Cherry Kingdom. A calm and chill, whitelisted Create Mod server where creativity and fun come together.
body: The Cherry Kingdom is a whitelisted Minecraft SMP focused on technical gameplay and engineering with the Create Mod. The server emphasizes automation, mechanical systems, and large-scale contraptions, encouraging players to design efficient factories, transport networks, and redstone-integrated machines. With a collaborative, low-lag environment and an emphasis on optimization and problem-solving, The Cherry Kingdom is built for players who enjoy pushing Create’s mechanics to their limits.
